name: Southwestern Cheese Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cream cheese and grated cheddar cheese in a large bowl. Beat until fluffy.
2. Stir in 1 cup of sour cream and taco seasoning.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Fold in the chopped green chilies.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 9-inch springform pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes or until set.
7. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes.
8. Spoon the remaining sour cream over the top, spreading gently.
9. Return to oven for an additional 5 minutes.
10. Remove from oven and let cool completely on a wire rack before serving.
11. When ready to serve, remove the outer side of the pan and garnish with salsa served alongside with tortilla chips.
